title: geranium auriculatum
intro: Geranium auriculatum, also known as the 'Ear Drop Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geranium auriculatum include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Geranium auriculatum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
